title: Shadow Docket — Emergency Stay Without Explanation

bottlenecks.summary: Supreme Court failed to publish a written explanation identifying the legal basis and the justices joining the emergency order by day 3 under Article IV Section 9.7.

satisfied_duties.duty: void the unexplained emergency stay pursuant to Article IV Section 9.7
satisfied_duties.outcome: voided the unexplained emergency stay for failure to comply with the Article IV Section 9.7 explanation requirement

failed_duties.duty: publish a written explanation identifying the legal basis and the justices joining the emergency order
failed_duties.outcome: Supreme Court failed to publish a written explanation identifying the legal basis and the justices joining the emergency order by day 3 under Article IV Section 9.7.

ai_summary.primary_bottleneck: Supreme Court failed to publish a written explanation identifying the legal basis and the justices joining the emergency order by day 3 under Article IV Section 9.7.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
